choose.when: SELECT HOUR(salestime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY HOUR(salestime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DAYOFWEEK(salestime) - 1 AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(salestime) - 1 ORDER BY label

SELECT DAY(salestime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAY(salestime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(salestime, '%Y%m%d') AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(salestime) ORDER BY label

SELECT MONTH(salestime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY MONTH(salestime) ORDER BY label

SELECT HOUR(salestime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY HOUR(salestime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DAYOFWEEK(salestime) - 1 AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(salestime) - 1 ORDER BY label

SELECT DAY(salestime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAY(salestime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(salestime, '%Y%m%d') AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(salestime) ORDER BY label

SELECT MONTH(salestime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(saleprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_sales WHERE DATE(salestime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(salestime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY MONTH(salestime) ORDER BY label
